data.name: Re:從H開始的異世界生活
data.detailed_description:
「蕾姆我老婆!」

和善良的賢妻魔王戀愛調情做愛
拯救被祖靈操控的心地善良的美少女魔王，捨棄彼此的身份，悠閒地過著同居生活。
兩個人獨處的過著無拘無束的戀愛調情生活，在互相尋求的過程中享受著無拘無束的性愛

她是一位既可愛又巨乳專心致志的理想妻子
被你拯救的她，是與魔王形象完全相反的溫柔獻身的賢妻美少女。
請享受和老婆在一起的新婚生活的甜蜜。

一邊活用幻想，一邊和可愛的魔王媳婦的H完美融合
親密kiss老婆+初次H♪，羞澀地穿著女僕裝給我口交♪，開發魔王老婆可愛的肛門，性感內衣新妻魔王的誘惑H，護士Cosplay看護H，穿著危險泳衣甜美假期H，穿著塞克巴斯的詛咒裝備被責備H，與魔王野外約會的室外性交H，以H的婚禮身姿進行配種受精H，臨月魔王妻子的裸體圍裙H，和懷孕的大肚子的魔王妻子的甜美調情服務，享受生日祝福的女體甜品甜蜜戀愛H♪

用萌音熱情演繹賢妻魔王的故事，滿滿的色情氛圍
用甜美可愛的萌音和H甜美的情色聲，完美演繹出與魔王妻子的異世界新婚的纏綿不休的性生活。

激情又甜美的新婚生活，新婚的聲音自不必說，沒有xxoo的過激淫語連發，甜蜜的情色也滿滿的！


特點:
  • 從原裝日本VN本地化。
  • 蕾姆醬帶有日文語音。
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。
  • 多小時的內容。
  • 帶有音樂和音效。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。
  • 14個與蕾姆醬的新夫妻成人劇情。

「Re:從H開始的異世界生活」是一個英文本地化的VN，由著名日本製作室 Norn/Miel所創作。我們在cherry kiss櫻桃社試圖將日本遊戲帶到全世界。

**注意**
所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這遊戲裡。

data.short_description: 「蕾姆我老婆!」 相信很多人都有過這樣的夢想，清晨躺在床上等待脫光光的蕾姆來喚醒自己，一日三餐都是蕾姆精心準備的愛液，在異國瘋狂地和蕾姆H….甚至還能把她射得滿滿。如果有人突然告訴你，這些夢想都可以實現.....
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OSX 10.6+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Runaway Demon Bride
data.detailed_description:
Transported to a forest that separates the Demon and Human world you encounter Lise, an adorable demon in distress, who summoned you by accident when she was attacked by bandits. After a brief battle with the bandits Lise, who is too pure for this world or ours, heals their wounds so they don't bleed out before someone finds them. Even though she is a Demon she doesn't want to see people suffer but is forced to flee after some human soldiers come to investigate the strange noises your little scuffle caused.

The soldiers that found you enlist you to join the Human forces that defend the border between the warring worlds, even though you're now fighting demons you never forgot that fateful encounter with Lise in the woods. Finally, you have arrived at the Demon Lord's castle ready to have the ultimate battle to end the war between Demons and Humans and as you enter the final boss room the shadowy form of what can only be the Demon Lord looks exactly Lise!

Can you find a way to bring back the pure and kind Riche and save the world?

  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Lise is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • 14 scenes of wedded bliss shared with your lovely Demon Bride, Lise.

Runaway Demon Bride is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Norn/Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Summoned to another world by the cutest Demon in all the realms, you set off to end the war between Demon and Humankind so you can run away with your demon bride and enjoy a life of wedded bliss!
data.supported_languages: English, French, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
